title: Tankers Research Update
summary:
Main
VLCC tonne miles fell as China's crude imports fell to four-month low in May
China's crude oil imports fell to a four-month low in May, dropping to 9.54m b/d, according to data from Vortexa. This represents a 14% decline from April's 11.1m b/d. Shipments from the Middle East Gulf (MEG) to China were particularly impacted, falling to 4.85m b/d in May-a 15% decrease from 5.69m b/d in April and the lowest volume since June 2022.
